nasb.text: Now Saul had given Michal his daughter, David’s wife, to Palti the son of Laish, who was from Gallim.

esv.text: Saul had given Michal his daughter, David’s wife, to Palti the son of Laish, who was of Gallim.

cnv.text: 掃羅已經把他的女兒米甲，就是大衛的妻子，賜給了迦琳人拉億的兒子帕提作妻子。

ccb.text: 扫罗已经把自己的女儿——大卫的妻子米甲嫁给了迦琳人拉亿的儿子帕提。
